subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-02-14
subcodes.first_line: The president of last night's gathering stated that Baha'u'llah was the greatest of God's Manfiestations… Yet, the inhabitants of Paris do not share the spirituality and zeal of the Americans, who are truly something else
subcodes.first_line_orig: دیشب رئیس مجلس گفت حضرت بهآءاللّٰه اعظم مظاهر الهیّه است و ذکر عظمت امر اللّٰه را نمود
